summary: Recording has an inverted‑channel problem that makes the mix unusable; no musical details are provided.
review: The sole reviewer flags a serious technical flaw – the left/right channels are swapped, resulting in phase issues – and points to a fixed version hosted elsewhere. No comments on the performance itself are given, so the show’s musical quality cannot be assessed from this feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, rating of 0 stars and a clear complaint about a major recording defect; no positive musical information to raise the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Inverted channel (left/right swapped) causing phase problems; a corrected version is available via a separate archive.org link.
